platform_attempts.error: No supported renderers found - requires OpenGL 3.2+ Core Profile
platform_attempts.detail: Mesa software renderer does not provide OpenGL 3.2 Core
llvmpipe (software Vulkan) selected as device but Unity segfaults on it. Needs real GPU ICD.

environment.gpu: None (no nvidia-smi, no hardware GPU passthrough)
environment.opengl: Mesa software - no GLX 3.2 Core Profile

resolution.option_1: Run on machine with NVIDIA GPU + nvidia-docker or native Linux
resolution.option_2: Use WSL2 with GPU-PV (requires Windows GPU driver passthrough enabled)
resolution.option_3: Use ai2thor-docker image: docker run --gpus all allenai/ai2thor-docker
resolution.option_4: Use cloud VM with GPU (AWS g4dn, GCP T4, Azure NC)

code_readiness: All adapter/MCP/safety code is correct and tested with mock. Real AI2-THOR tests need only GPU environment to run.
